generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HeatBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Surface heat‑bed (214 mm × 214 mm × 3 mm) driven through MOSFET switches via optocoupler‑isolated GPIO signals"
]

instance InternalFanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12 V/24 V internal circulation fan (≈0.02 m³ s⁻¹) driven via MOSFET switches with optocoupler isolation"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance InsideBoxTopTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer mounted inside the insulated box at the upper height",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideBoxTopTempDataTransmitted
]

instance InsideBoxBottomTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer mounted inside the insulated box at the lower height",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideBoxBottomTempDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientRoomTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer measuring ambient room temperature outside the box",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientRoomTempDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance InsideBoxTopTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideBoxTopTempSensor
]

instance InsideBoxBottomTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideBoxBottomTempSensor
]

instance AmbientRoomTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientRoomTempSensor
]

// C10: Data (temperature measurements)
instance InsideBoxTopTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped temperature reading from the upper inside‑box sensor (range –55 °C to +125 °C, accuracy ±0.5 °C)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InsideBoxTopTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance InsideBoxBottomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped temperature reading from the lower inside‑box sensor (range –55 °C to +125 °C, accuracy ±0.5 °C)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InsideBoxBottomTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance AmbientRoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped temperature reading from the ambient room sensor (range –55 °C to +125 °C, accuracy ±0.5 °C)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientRoomTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based Model A assumes all electrical power heats the air free parameters V, I, G_box, C_air",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based Model B extends Model A by adding heat‑bed thermal mass with parameters C_heater, G_heater",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RabbitMQBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AMQP broker (RabbitMQ) running on the Raspberry Pi receives and forwards temperature messages",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService,
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation engine that executes thermal models for temperature prediction",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService
]

instance SciPyLeastSquaresEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SciPy least‑squares optimizer used for non‑linear calibration of model parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance PythonDriverEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python low‑level driver that reads sensors and controls MOSFET‑driven actuators via GPIO",
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance TemperatureSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation of internal air temperature using calibrated Model A or Model B",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic calibration of model parameters via SciPy non‑linear least‑squares on experimental temperature trajectories",
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring of temperature against configured lower‑limit (LL) and upper‑limit (UL) generates safety alerts",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyThresholdBreachInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlLimitsAction,
    DTDFVocab:provides IssueSafetyAlertAction
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang‑bang supervisory control that issues heating (H) and waiting (C) durations to maintain a reference temperature",
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatingDurationAction,
    DTDFVocab:provides IssueMaintenanceAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous estimation of model parameters (e.g., C_air, G_box) from live sensor data"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted internal air temperature from the selected thermal model"
]

instance SafetyThresholdBreachInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection that measured temperature exceeds configured LL or UL limits"
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating that prediction error exceeds a predefined threshold, suggesting possible maintenance"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustControlLimitsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjust lower‑limit (LL) and upper‑limit (UL) based on updated parameter estimates",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IssueSafetyAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate a safety alert message when temperature limits are breached",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IssueMaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger a maintenance alert when model prediction error exceeds a set threshold",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command the heat‑bed and fan with specific heating (H) and waiting (C) durations to reach the reference temperature",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment grouping
instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HeatBedActuator,
                InternalFanActuator,
                InsideBoxTopTempSensor,
                InsideBoxBottomTempSensor,
                AmbientRoomTempSensor,
                RabbitMQBrokerEnabler,
                SimulationEngineEnabler,
                SciPyLeastSquaresEnabler,
                PythonDriverEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "DT components send actuation commands (heat‑bed ON/OFF, fan ON/OFF, heating duration, waiting duration) as AMQP messages to the RabbitMQ broker. The controller on the Raspberry Pi subscribes to these topics, interprets the commands, and drives the MOSFET‑controlled actuators accordingly."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT architecture follows the schematic in Fig. 1/7: the Physical Twin (box, heat‑bed, fan, sensors) is connected to a Raspberry Pi controller. The controller interfaces with a low‑level driver and a RabbitMQ server. DT services run as separate processes that subscribe to the broker, consume sensor streams, update the models, and publish actuation commands, forming a tightly coupled cyber‑physical loop."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity relies on assumptions: uniform air temperature (validated by fan‑induced mixing experiments), negligible wall heat storage, constant air specific heat, and (for Model A) all electrical power converts to heat. Validation experiments measured temperature discrepancies (≤7 °C) across sensor locations and demonstrated that higher fan voltage reduced variance. Calibration residuals are minimised by non‑linear least squares; model B showed better prediction of thermal inertia."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual and virtual‑to‑physical data exchange uses the RabbitMQ broker on the Raspberry Pi, communicating over standard AMQP/TCP‑IP. The Raspberry Pi’s built‑in Wi‑Fi or Ethernet provides network connectivity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT components (low‑level driver, controller, calibration scripts, and model simulation services) are deployed on the same Raspberry Pi that hosts the RabbitMQ server, and can be accessed remotely over the network for monitoring and control."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The low‑level driver incorporates a safe protocol that forces the PT into a predefined safe state before processing commands. The controller enforces lower and upper temperature limits to prevent overheating. Communication relies on RabbitMQ, which can be secured with standard authentication, though specific security measures are not detailed in the document."
]
